---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include any error messages shown in the web UI.

## Environment
- **OS**: (e.g. Windows 11, macOS, Linux)
- **Dwarf Fortress version**: (e.g. Steam 50.14)
- **DFHack version**: (e.g. 50.14-r1)
- **LLM Provider**: (Ollama / Claude / OpenAI)
- **LLM Model**: (e.g. llama3, gpt-oss:20b)
- **Python version**: (run `python --version`)

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots of the issue.

## Additional Context
Any other context — fortress size, what you were doing in DF when the issue occurred, etc.
